title: Highball Drinking Tumbler Glasses Set of 4, 320ml Official Coca Cola Contour Glasses, Retro Highball Glass for Coke, Soda, Water, Gin & Juice - Includes 2ply Paper Napkins
features: HIGH-QUALITY GLASSWARE - Made from tempered glass that is both sturdy and elegant. Designed to withstand daily use while showcasing your drinks beautifully.

OFFICIAL MERCHANDISE - Classic Coca-Cola contour-shaped glass with embossed letters for iconic style. Perfect for Coca-Cola collectors and fans. These glasses celebrate timeless brand heritage while being a practical addition to your kitchen.
GENEROUS CAPACITY - Each glass holds approximately 320ml / 10.8oz, making them ideal for sodas, juices, cocktails, iced tea, water, or milkshakes.
DISHWASHER SAFE - Easy to clean and maintain, safe for daily use without losing clarity or shine.
PRODUCT SIZE - Each glass has an approximate size of Height: 15.5cm / Top Diameter: 8cm / Base Diameter: 6cm
INCLUDED PAPER NAPKINS - Includes a pack of 20 disposable paper napkins (2ply) with every purchase.
description: Sip in style with an icon. This Official Coca-Cola Contour Highball Glasses brings the world's most recognizable beverage design straight to your table. Perfect for soft drinks, cocktails, or everyday refreshment, these glasses combine brand heritage with modern functionality.
